title: Franky and His Pals
overview: Drak, Franky, Humper, Wolfie, and Mummy were stuck inside of a cave, due to an avalanche, years ago. Recently escaped, with a treasure map in hand, the gang of monsters explores the town of French Gulch in search for gold!
